message:
🐛 Fix sidebar navigation with full page reload workaround

React Router v7's startTransition-based navigation is blocked by
recharts' useSyncExternalStore infinite loops (React 19 incompatibility).
Neither flushSync, pushState+popstate, nor Outlet key tricks can bypass
this. Full page reload is the only reliable navigation method until
recharts resolves the React 19 infinite loop in ChartDataContextProvider.

Skips reload when clicking the already-active route.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
